habitat: Temperate Europe and Asia; nitrogen-rich soils, roadsides, woods.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional use for urinary tract support and joint discomfort; spring greens as food.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell bei Harnwegsbeschwerden und Gelenkbeschwerden; Frühlingsgemüse.
activeCompounds: Flavonoids, minerals, amines (histamine in fresh hairs), sterols in root
preparation: Cooked leaves, dried leaf tea, root extracts.
cautions: Fresh plant stings. Seek advice for root extracts and with medications.
historicalNotes: Long staple of European folk medicine and cuisine once cooked.
habitatDe: Gemäßigt Europa und Asien; nitrogen-rich soils, Wegränder, Wälder.
activeCompoundsDe: Flavonoids, minerals, amines (histamine in frisch hairs), sterols in Wurzel
preparationDe: Cooked Blätter, getrocknet Blatt Tee, Wurzel Extrakte.
cautionsDe: Frisch plant stings. Seek advice für Wurzel Extrakte und mit medications.
historicalNotesDe: Long staple von Europaan folk medicine und cuisine once gekocht.
